Interface IAssetType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of an asset type.

[Guid("C9EF9792-94C7-4CDC-AEB6-9E6A56288FBA")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAssetType

Properties

AssetTypeCode

Returns the asset type code.

int AssetTypeCode { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

AssetTypeName

Returns the asset type name.

string AssetTypeName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

AssociationDeleteType

The delete behavior for container and structure associations.

esriAssociationDeleteType AssociationDeleteType { get; }

Property Value

esriAssociationDeleteType

Returns the association role type.

esriAssociationRoleType AssociationRoleType { get; }

esriAssociationRoleType

Sample Snippet

Categories

Returns categories.

IStringArray Categories { get; }

IStringArray

Sample Snippet

ConnectivityPolicy

Returns the connectivity policy.

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy ConnectivityPolicy { get; }

Property Value

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy

Examples

Sample Snippet

ContainerViewScale

The initial scale (representative fraction) at which the container feature will display.

double ContainerViewScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Returns the creation time.

object CreationTime { get; }

object

IsLinearConnectivityPolicySupported

Returns whether the linear connectivity policy is supported.

bool IsLinearConnectivityPolicySupported { get; }

bool

bool
